name: Poob (PARTYNOOB)
description:
CW: FACESITTING AND SMOTHERING

... On May 26, 2024, after dropping his 5th bot, "Noelle," GRIMKid would drop Zombcat, the second Roblox facesitting bot to exist, and the first bot to use Lamentlife's work. However, on August 8, 2024, GRIMKid released his bot "Monstercat Mommies," not knowing that this bot would impact it. The Monstercat Mommies become viral, making 5.6k (recorded on September 26, 2024). GRIMKid would continue making Roblox facesitting bots, being the only creator with the most Roblox facesitting bots. From Lamentlife, to Mermio, to MaruCat87, to Melanzanamustdie. Then, on April 9, 2025, during the making of Reevie, the Monstercat Mommies hit 100k, becoming GRIMKid's first bot to hit 100k. But, on May 26, 2025, GRIMKid released Macy, but stopped making more Roblox facesitting bots, making it his "last Roblox facesitting bot." GRIMKid would focus more on non-Roblox bots, including going viral for his bot "Tanner & Tris," which would be his second bot to hit 100k. But now, GRIMKid is back, back to doing more Roblox facesitting bots.

Yes, I'm back doing more. However, I do wanna say this: Why did I stop making Roblox facesitting bots? It wasn't because I was being hated, but because I got bored with it, losing interest in making Roblox bots. I was even thinking of retiring, yes, retiring from Roblox bots, and passing it down to new creators who want Roblox facesitting to be alive. But, I wanna give this a final chance.

... Just check the scenario for God's sake.

More pics + facesitting pics can be found here: 1(STASH/EXTRA)

PIC BY LAMENTLIFE
